title: mldsa verify uses truncating as-cast for sig/msg lengths
description: MlDsaKey::verify passes sig.len() as u32 and msg.len() as u32 (bare truncating casts) to wolfhsm_mldsa_verify. On a 64-bit host where either slice exceeds u32::MAX bytes the length is silently truncated to a wrong value, causing the C call to read wrong data. All other size parameters in this codebase use u32::try_from(...).map_err(...). Fix: replace both casts with try_from checks returning WolfHsmError::BadArgs.
